summary: Implement Bubble Tea SessionsModel for the sessions panel (left panel, 25% width). Supports states (Loading/Populated/Empty/Error), search sub-states (Active/Invalid/NoResults), j/k navigation, Enter selection emitting SessionSelectMsg, / search with real-time filtering and date pattern auto-detection (YYYY-MM-DD, MM-DD), Esc cancel, Tab/1 focus keys, and View rendering with lipgloss styled panel borders, selection markers, and i18n labels.
keyDecisions: 3.1: Used value receiver for SessionsModel with explicit Set* methods returning updated copies (immutable update pattern matching Bubble Tea conventions)
3.1: Search states (Active/Invalid/NoResults) all route through handleSearchKey allowing Esc from any search sub-state
3.1: Date pattern auto-detection uses regex matching YYYY-MM-DD or MM-DD formats against date column
3.1: Non-date keywords match against file paths with case-insensitive comparison
3.1: Backspace handled via both msg.String()=='backspace' and msg.Type==tea.KeyBackspace for cross-platform support
3.1: View rendering uses lipgloss rounded borders with cyan (focused) or dim (unfocused) color
3.1: Panel width < 25 returns empty string (minimum width guard)
3.1: Golden file tests for all major view states (populated, empty, loading, error, search active, unfocused)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: internal/model/sessions.go implements SessionsModel with Init(), Update(msg tea.Msg), View() string
States: Loading -> Populated/Empty/Error, Search Active, Search Invalid, Search No Results
Keyboard: j/k navigation, Enter select, / search, Esc cancel search, Tab focus transfer, 1 focus self
Search filters in real-time as user types
Date pattern auto-detection (YYYY-MM-DD, MM-DD) in search
Empty search (0 chars) shows validation message
View rendering: panel border, title, session rows, selection marker, search prompt
Golden file tests for rendered output
State transition tests (key handling, cursor position, search state)

notes: Added bubbletea, lipgloss, and bubbles as Go module dependencies. Search validation message currently uses picker.no_results i18n key for invalid state display. Empty search validation message key may need a dedicated i18n entry in a follow-up task.
